languages.text: "Тогда на этом дискуссия окончена". {n}Эоганн смягчается.{/n} "Я ценю ваши старания, но мало кому удается меня переспорить".
"Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."
languages.original_text: "Тогда на этом дискуссия окончена". {n}Эоганн смягчается.{/n} "Я ценю ваши старания, но мало кому удается меня переспорить".

traits.locale_text: "Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."
"Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."
"Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."
"Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."
"Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."
"Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."

languages.text: "Dann ist die Debatte hiermit beendet." {n}Er entspannt sich.{/n} "Ich weiß Eure Bemühungen zu schätzen, aber nur wenige können mich in einer Diskussion schlagen."
languages.original_text: "Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."

traits.locale_text: "Dann ist die Debatte hiermit beendet." {n}Er entspannt sich.{/n} "Ich weiß Eure Bemühungen zu schätzen, aber nur wenige können mich in einer Diskussion schlagen."

languages.text: « C'est ainsi que s'achève notre débat, dans ce cas, {n}déclare-t-il en se radoucissant.{/n} J'apprécie vos efforts, mais rares sont les gens capables de me tenir tête en matière d'éloquence. »
languages.original_text: "Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."

traits.locale_text: « C'est ainsi que s'achève notre débat, dans ce cas, {n}déclare-t-il en se radoucissant.{/n} J'apprécie vos efforts, mais rares sont les gens capables de me tenir tête en matière d'éloquence. »

languages.text: «Entonces el debate queda concluido». {n}Suaviza el gesto.{/n} «Le agradezco el esfuerzo, pero no hay mucha gente capaz de ganarme en un debate».
languages.original_text: "Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."

traits.locale_text: «Entonces el debate queda concluido». {n}Suaviza el gesto.{/n} «Le agradezco el esfuerzo, pero no hay mucha gente capaz de ganarme en un debate».

languages.text: "O zaman tartışma bitmiştir." {n}Yumuşuyor.{/n} "Çabalarınızı takdir ediyorum ama tartışmada beni alt etmeyi başarabilen çok az kişi vardır."
languages.original_text: "Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."

traits.locale_text: "O zaman tartışma bitmiştir." {n}Yumuşuyor.{/n} "Çabalarınızı takdir ediyorum ama tartışmada beni alt etmeyi başarabilen çok az kişi vardır."

languages.text: “那么辩论到此为止。”{n}他语气软了下来。{/n}“您的这份坚持我很欣赏，不过很少有人能在辩论中胜过我。”
languages.original_text: "Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."

traits.locale_text: “那么辩论到此为止。”{n}他语气软了下来。{/n}“您的这份坚持我很欣赏，不过很少有人能在辩论中胜过我。”

languages.text: 「では、議論は終わりです」{n}彼の態度が和らぐ。{/n}「あなたの尽力には感謝します。しかし、議論で私を打ち負かせる者は、ごくわずかしかいないのです」
languages.original_text: "Then the debate is concluded." {n}He softens.{/n} "I appreciate your efforts, but few ever manage to best me in an argument."

traits.locale_text: 「では、議論は終わりです」{n}彼の態度が和らぐ。{/n}「あなたの尽力には感謝します。しかし、議論で私を打ち負かせる者は、ごくわずかしかいないのです」
